css_layout_rules.hero: position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100svh; text-align: center; padding: 7rem 1.5rem 5rem; overflow: hidden;
css_layout_rules.hero_bg: background: var(--gradient-hero); position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
css_layout_rules.hero_content: position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto;
css_layout_rules.logos: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.5rem; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
css_layout_rules.features_alternating: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4rem; padding: 5rem 1.5rem;
css_layout_rules.faq: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1rem; padding: 5rem 1.5rem; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;

seo.h1: AI-Powered Credit Dispute Letters — Fight Back Against Errors
seo.meta_description: Upload your credit report, let AI find errors, and generate FCRA-compliant dispute letters in minutes. Start free with Credit Clarity.
